picks.title: 42nd Annual Cupertino Cherry Blossom Festival
picks.why: 42-year tradition celebrating Japanese culture with taiko drums and dance—rare annual festival honoring sister city bond.

picks.title: Los Gatos Wine Walk
picks.why: Over 1,200 locals, 40 wineries, 37 businesses—iconic Los Gatos spring tradition you can't replicate any weekend.

picks.title: Stroll Down Penny Lane – Celebrating the Life & Music of Sir Paul McCartney
picks.why: Live Paul McCartney tribute with films spanning his entire career—one-night celebration of a music legend.

picks.title: Free Admission on Nikkei Matsuri!
picks.venue: Japanese American Museum of San Jose
picks.why: Free museum admission during Nikkei Matsuri—rare chance to explore Japanese American history with cultural festivities.

picks.title: Spring into Green 2026
picks.why: Los Gatos' 10-year sustainability anniversary with 20+ interactive booths and live music—milestone celebration worth attending.
